channel.title: Persistence on bubka hacks stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Persistence on bubka hacks stuff

item.title: CDEF-EtherRAT
item.description: An attacker breached Maromalix’s public-facing web application by exploiting CVE-2025-55182 (Next.js Deserialization RCE). They deployed a multi-stage implant dubbed EtherRAT, which utilizes a blockchain-based C2 mechanism via Ethereum smart contracts to dynamically resolve infrastructure. The attacker exfiltrated sensitive data, established multiple persistence mechanisms, and ultimately patched the vulnerability to lock out other actors.
